top_signals.title: Stocks Halt Rally on Conflicting US-Iran Signals: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Wall Street traders sent stocks lower amid mixed signals about prospects for a US-Iran deal to end the war and revive energy flows through the key Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil prices fall 4% after Rubio says U.S. will give Iran talks 'every chance to succeed'
top_signals.summary: U.S. crude oil prices trim losses as traders assess whether U.S. is nearing a deal with Iran that would restore traffic in the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
